title: Smoky Malaysian Tofu Curry
description: A citrusy and cozy Malaysian dish featuring basil and smoky flavors, perfect for a chilly evening. This vegetarian-friendly curry is made with chewy tofu and a blend of aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cook for 1 minute.
Add the smoked paprika and curry powder, cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the firm tofu and cook until golden brown, about 5 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the chopped basil, salt, and lime juice.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
